overall.description: A cinematic stationary view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, showcasing dense neon-lit skyscrapers and occasional flying vehicles traversing the skyline. The scene features the distinctive visual style of Cyberpunk 2077 with atmospheric haze, vibrant artificial lighting, and a high vantage point overlooking the urban sprawl.

events.description: flying vehicle enters from right side and moves left across the upper skyline
second flying vehicle traverses horizontally through the center of the frame
flying car moves from left to right in the distance above the buildings

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on a high vantage point overlooking the illuminated cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally across the skyline from right to left

entered.detail: tall central building featuring a large vertical digital billboard displaying a beverage advertisement with the number 10 illuminated below it
illuminated sign with Japanese characters at the peak of the central tower
massive elevated highway or monorail structure with support pillars running along the right side
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with various red and blue neon signs
modern glass skyscraper with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: A stationary panoramic view from a high rooftop vantage point overlooking a dense cyberpunk cityscape at night. The scene is dominated by a central tower featuring a prominent vertical billboard and neon signage, surrounded by clusters of illuminated skyscrapers and an elevated transit structure. Sparse flying traffic moves across the hazy skyline at various intervals while the camera captures the atmospheric neon glow and urban density of the futuristic metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, high-altitude perspective that captures the sprawling density and atmospheric glow of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night. It begins with a wide panoramic view from a rooftop vantage point, centering on a massive tower adorned with a prominent vertical billboard and vibrant neon signage. As the gaze lingers, the scene expands to reveal clusters of illuminated skyscrapers and the intricate lines of an elevated transit structure cutting through the urban sprawl. The composition is then punctuated by the intermittent movement of sparse flying traffic gliding across the hazy skyline, further emphasizing the scale of the city. Finally, the shot settles into the deep atmospheric neon glow that permeates the dense, high-tech environment.
